content.text:
All 5 tests pass. Note on the skill reminder: no skills are needed here—this is a TDD Green phase task.

Green Phase Complete:
- Implementation: Replaced the hardcoded `if/else` logic with a small state machine that tracks `(x, y, heading)`. `L`/`R` look up the new heading in rotation tables; `F` adds the per-heading delta to the position; the result is formatted as `x:y:heading`.
- Result: All 5 active tests pass (5 todo remain).
- Approach: Continued hardcoding (`if (commands === "F") return "0:1:N"`) was no longer the simplest path — it would have required another special case for `"RF"`, plus more for upcoming forward-when-facing-south/west tests. A tiny state machine is actually the simpler implementation now that we have a forward command combined with rotation. Logic stays minimal: three lookup tables plus a single loop, with no features added beyond what the active tests demand (no wrapping, no obstacles, no input validation).

Implementation file: `/home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-03_03-03-28_mars-rover-prose_v4-exact-subagents_opus-4-7-no-thinking/src/mars-rover.ts`

Proceeding to Refactor phase.
